data.name: Exception_IndexEqualToOrHigherThanNumberOfLocations
data.value: {0} ({1}) can not be equal to or higher than {2} ({3}).

data.name: SobekRRPavedReader_Warning_UnsupportedDischargeTarget
data.value: Unsupported {0} discharge target for paved data with id {1}. Will be set to lateral source or boundary node.

data.name: SobekReader_Could_not_read_file_because_it_is_locked
data.value: Could not read file {0}: it is locked by another process.

data.name: SobekRREvaporationReader_ParseLine_Line__0___Not_all_date_values_are_valid_integers_
data.value: Line {0}: Not all date values are valid integers.

data.name: SobekRREvaporationReader_ParseLine_Line__0___Not_all_evaporation_values_are_valid_floating_point_numbers_
data.value: Line {0}: Not all evaporation values are valid floating-point numbers.

data.name: SobekRREvaporationReader_Read_The_current__0__does_not_support_reading_
data.value: The current {0} does not support reading.

data.name: The_extra_resistance_functionality_is_not_supported_skipping_this_item_with_id_0
data.value: The extra resistance functionality is not supported, skipping this item with id: {0}
